content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Titan
description: Legendary Titan is a Legendary class mod for Salvador in Borderlands 2. It is made by Anshin and was introduced with the Digistruct Peak content.
notes: Requires Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge to obtain and use.

special.description: At max level it provides health regeneration of +31,421 per second, gun damage +40%, and shield capacity -718,193. The gun damage bonus only affects Salvador's right-hand weapon while Gunzerking.
special.title: "Challenge accepted."
